parsed_review.summary: CP00-890 (RP29 Commercial Readiness, risk C, 150 units, RP29.P07.M04.S16-RP29.P08.M01.S05) is a descriptor-only pack closing the P07 failure-recovery tail and opening the P08 Hermes-evidence foundation. Read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level production_ready promotion is supported and no defects block closeout. Implementation: COMMERCIAL_CP890_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:354) matches the baseline exactly (risk C, 150 units, first RP29.P07.M04.S16, last RP29.P08.M01.S05, upstream CP00-889, next CP00-891/RP29.P08.M01.S06); COMMERCIAL_CP890_REQUIREMENTS deliverable/phase/micro/title distributions match the prompt and baseline and sum to 150; row slices of COMMERCIAL_FAILURE_ROWS (22 entries) and COMMERCIAL_HERMES_EVIDENCE_ROWS produce the exact S16-start failure tail and the P08.M00/M01 heads. No-write/no-real-data boundaries: createFailureRecoverySectionRows/createHermesEvidenceSectionRows and COMMERCIAL_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION set runtime_execution, permission_decision_written, audit_event_written, runtime_receipt_emitted, real_client_data_included, and credential_or_secret_included all false; failure rows assert no recovery/rollback/retry/compensation execution; Hermes rows assert hermes_command_executes_now/hermes_receipt_emitted/secret-leak/real-data flags all false. Tests (model.test.js:745-795) are substantive and read the live plan via planPack(); validators (validators.js:2270-2400) enforce distribution, authority boundary, per-row no-runtime/no-secret, packet gates, capabilities, and contract projection; validate-rp29-commercial-readiness-contract.mjs chains all bindings CP873->CP890 and validates coverage/descriptor/contract. Contracts commercial-readiness-contract.json and the compatibility alias are updated to CP00-890 (latest_pack, latest_projection CommercialCp890FailureHermesBridgeDescriptor, alias latest_pack_id) and are not stale. Live queue/plan/manifest agree (live_next_unit_id RP29.P07.M04.S16, generated preview CP00-890); manifest is status in_progress, production_ready false, runtime_ready false, implementation_layer descriptor. Authority boundary preserved: Claude read_only and not final approver (claude_packet.read_only true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval false, descriptor.authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval false), Hermes descriptor-only and not embedded in product runtime (emits_runtime_receipt false), local validation does not claim enterprise trust, and human final approval is required before runtime opening at CP00-891. Review-evidence integrity (CP178+): readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1228-byte valid JSON result); validation-report shows prompt 2687B under the 25600B limit, no full diff/source embedded, source_inspection_mode read_tools_used, summary-only prohibited and not used, schema present, no forbidden tools, no omitted active untracked implementation files; the current claude-review-result is the legitimate pending placeholder, not a fabricated PASS. Per the designed sequence the pack does not yet assert production_ready (pending_review) and the full deterministic validation ladder (npm test, npm run validate, closeout-pack:validate, weighted/fullplan/goal/rp00 validators, git diff --check) runs after this receipt is normalized and adjudicated; command-evidence records only targeted checks (syntax, commercial model/service tests, rp29:commercial:validate, all exit 0) and explicitly discloses the remaining ladder, which is expected and not a blocker. blocks_goal_closeout is false: this CP claims neither runtime nor enterprise trust, so the human/enterprise-trust authority boundary is outside this receipt. No P0-P3 findings.
